certificate: TZPID Papers XI-XV consolidated Wolfram verification

results.name: paper_xi_first_bao_node
results.note: k1 = Pi/rs gives k1 rs = Pi.

results.name: paper_xi_xiv_bao_period_alignment
results.note: Paper XI Delta k_BAO matches Paper XIV BAO period 2 Pi/rs.

results.name: paper_xiv_modes_per_wiggle_ratio
results.note: BAO period divided by curvature-mode spacing gives 2 Pi Rc/rs.

results.name: paper_xiv_direct_shell_inverse
results.note: Direct-shell radius R = 1/Delta k is inverse to the target spacing.

results.name: paper_xiv_beat_epsilon_sets_scale
results.note: epsilon = 1/(Delta k Rc) makes beat spacing equal Delta k.

results.name: paper_xii_aic_flat_value
results.note: AIC = chi^2 + 2k gives 20.13 for chi^2=16.13, k=2.

results.name: paper_xiii_plus_ell_cascade
results.note: Moving from S^(n-1) to S^n raises each unit-radius eigenvalue by ell.

results.name: paper_xiii_xiv_s3_degeneracy_prefix
results.note: S3 degeneracy prefix agrees across geometry and BAO-amplitude carriers.

results.name: paper_xiii_xiv_s4_degeneracy_prefix
results.note: S4 degeneracy prefix agrees across geometry and BAO-amplitude carriers.

results.name: paper_xiii_xiv_s5_degeneracy_prefix
results.note: S5 degeneracy prefix agrees across geometry and BAO-amplitude carriers.

results.name: paper_xiii_xv_breathing_volume_closure
results.note: TRAWIN breathing closure agrees with S3 volume-rate law.

results.name: paper_xiii_xv_vacuum_continuity_fixed_point
results.note: At p=-rho c^2, continuity reduces to rhodot, giving constant vacuum density when rhodot=0.

results.name: paper_xv_far_field_free_wave_limit
results.note: Sourced wave equation reduces to free wave in the far-field source-free limit.

results.name: paper_xv_operator_alphabet_count
results.note: TRAWIN alphabet has six operator classes.
